Service 01

Verified International
Buyer Leads

Receive verified buyer enquiries matched to your exact product category. Every lead is manually reviewed before delivery — so you only speak with serious, ready-to-buy international buyers.

  • Matched to your product category and export readiness
  • Delivered via WhatsApp & email within 24–48 hours
  • 50+ countries — verified company details included
  • Full tracking via your real-time client portal
  • Starter: 10 leads · Growth: 25 · Professional: 40+

Service 02

Dedicated Relationship
Manager

Every BuyGenix member gets a named Relationship Manager — a real person available on WhatsApp who coordinates your leads and guides you through every step of exporting.

  • Named RM assigned within 24 hours of activation
  • Direct WhatsApp & email access at all times
  • Coordinates lead selection, delivery & follow-up
  • Export documentation guidance & buyer communication
  • Quarterly strategy reviews for Professional & Enterprise
Meet Our Team →

Service 03

Professional Digital
Product Catalogue

A professionally designed digital catalogue showcasing your products with images, specs and contact details — shareable with global buyers via WhatsApp, email or at trade fairs.

  • Created by our in-house design team with your branding
  • Single shareable link — WhatsApp, email, exhibitions
  • Growth: up to 10 products · Pro & Enterprise: unlimited
  • Updated whenever your product range changes
  • QR-code ready for trade fair and event use
Get Your Catalogue →

Service 04

SEO & Social Media
Optimisation

We optimise your profile for international search engines and run social media campaigns to grow your brand among global buyers — bringing organic enquiries directly to you.

  • SEO for your BuyGenix product pages and profile
  • Keyword targeting for your categories and export markets
  • Instagram and Facebook brand promotion campaigns
  • Growth: quarterly promotion · Professional: monthly
  • Content crafted to attract international buyer enquiries

Service 05

Virtual Business Card
& QR Profile

A premium digital business card with your brand, products, and a scannable QR code. Share it instantly at trade fairs, over WhatsApp, or by email — no printing required.

  • Premium card with your logo, products & contact info
  • QR code links directly to your full product catalogue
  • Shareable via WhatsApp, email, or LinkedIn instantly
  • Starter & Growth: 1 · Professional: 3 · Enterprise: unlimited
  • Updated whenever your business details change

Service 06

Registration &
Compliance Assistance

We guide you through every registration an Indian exporter needs — GST, IEC, MSME and FSSAI — ensuring your business is fully compliant and ready to trade globally.

  • GST registration assistance — all plans included
  • IEC (Import Export Code) registration support
  • MSME / Udyam registration for government benefits
  • FSSAI licence for food and agricultural exporters
  • Document checklist, application & status follow-up

Service 07

Performance Reports
& Analytics

Track your membership, lead delivery status and business metrics through your real-time client portal and regular reports from your Relationship Manager.

  • Monthly performance reports for Professional & Enterprise
  • On-request reports for Starter and Growth members
  • Lead tracking: sent, viewed and responded
  • Real-time dashboard via your client portal login
  • Quarterly export strategy consultation (Professional)
